title: Component media index
description: Slug → role-keyed map of media file paths under components/dist/media/. CI-derived from the on-disk dir layout by scripts/components/derive-media-index.js. Decoupled from guideline coverage: components with media but no guideline doc still appear here so consumers can render previews independently. Strict (additionalProperties:false) — CI-derived contract.

_schema_version.description: Schema version pin. Bumps require coordinated deriver + consumer updates.

_meta.description: Provenance block. Mirrors the foundations/categories/guidelines pipeline convention. No timestamps — idempotency requires byte-stable output across runs.

examples.do_not_edit: Edit via scripts/sync/sync-media-* phases; CI regenerates this file.

auto_generated.description: Always true — this object is CI-derived.

examples: Edit via scripts/sync/sync-media-* phases; CI regenerates this file.

media.description: Slug-keyed map of per-component media role maps. Sorted ASCII for byte-stable output.

additionalProperties.description: Role-keyed map of repo-relative paths for one component (role → path).
